description: Style Note We like the range of bright and colourful tunics, kurtas and kurtis that comes our way from fusion beats. They can be easily styled and never fail to catch hold of the latest fashion trends. Pair these with solid leggings and strappy flats for an ethnic look with a twist. Product Details Blue sleeveless tunic, has a round neckline and criss cross back with an embroidered panel at the juncture of the criss cross, embroidered front yoke with pom poms, piping on the sides, insert pockets on the sides above the hemline and yellow panels and pom poms above the hemline Material and Care Blended Hand wash cold Do not iron on decorations Size Regular Fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
